steps.title: Identify the starting value
steps.content: The current value is $186{,}000$, so that is the initial value when $x=0$.

steps.title: Find the growth multiplier
steps.content: An increase of $3.5\%$ means each year the value is multiplied by $1+0.035=1.035$.

steps.title: Build the function
steps.content: The exponential model is $$f(x)=186{,}000(1.035)^x$$ The answer is C.
